subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who, through His most exalted Word, hath revealed that which lay concealed in the treasuries of His grandeur and hidden in His repositories [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی اظهر بکلمته العلیا ما کان مکنونا فی کنائز عظمته و مخزونا
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @suffering and imprisonment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @service to others; to the Cause of God
